positive: A stunning, minimalist celestial scene featuring a majestic, geometric constellation arching over a stylized, sleeping crescent moon and a cluster of stylized, glowing nebula dust. The composition should be centered and balanced, using a strong negative/positive contrast palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and luminous gold. The style is modern abstract-surrealism, resembling woodcut etchings mixed with bioluminescence. The print must have clean lines, flat areas of color, and strong silhouettes against a dark background. Include faint, subtle patterns of abstract celestial paths (like stylized orbital lines) that enhance the geometric feel. Highly detailed, vector-illustration quality, optimized for t-shirt printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, busy, messy, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, sketch, photorealistic, gradients, realism
